instructions.name: flash_swap_pt
docs: Pendle-style flash borrow of PT against the market's escrow.
Sends `pt_out` PT from escrow to the caller, CPIs into
`callback_program` with a fixed ABI, then requires the callback to
have repaid the market's SY escrow by the AMM-quoted amount before
returning. See INTENT_FLASH_PLAN.md for the full spec and audit notes.

accounts.name: caller_pt_dst
docs: PT destination for the flash borrow. Must be caller-controlled.

accounts.name: token_sy_escrow
docs: Market-owned SY escrow; callback must top this up to close the flash.

accounts.name: token_pt_escrow
docs: Market-owned PT escrow the flash is borrowed from.

accounts.name: token_fee_treasury_sy
docs: SY fee destination.

accounts.name: callback_program
docs: own satisfaction — they sign the tx that selects this program.

accounts.name: market
docs: There is 1 market per vault

accounts.name: vault
docs: Links the mint_sy & mint_pt & sy_program together

accounts.name: escrow_sy
docs: This account for SY is only a temporary pass-through account
It is used to transfer SY tokens from the signer to the market
And then from the market to the SY program's escrow

accounts.name: pt_src
docs: Signer's PT token account

accounts.name: sy_src
docs: Signer's SY token account

accounts.name: lp_dst
docs: Receiving account for LP tokens

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Use the old Token program as the implementation for PT & SY & LP tokens

instructions.name: initialize_vault
docs: Permissionless vault init. Creator supplies the curator pubkey —
that pubkey controls all future modify_* instructions for this vault.
`creator_fee_bps` is the permanent upper bound on `interest_bps_fee`
(capped by `PROTOCOL_FEE_MAX_BPS` — see I-E1 / I-E2).

accounts.name: authority
docs: The signer for the vault

accounts.name: owner
docs: Owner of the new YieldTokenPosition
ie - the "owner" is not a Signer

errors.name: VaultIsNotActive
errors.msg: Vault has not started yet or has ended

errors.name: SyInvalidExchangeRate
errors.msg: SY program returned an invalid exchange rate

errors.name: SyEmissionIndexesMismatch
errors.msg: SY program emissions vec length does not match vault emissions

errors.name: FeeNotRatchetDown
errors.msg: Fee can only be ratcheted down

errors.name: StartTimestampInPast
errors.msg: Start timestamp is in the past

errors.name: MinOperationSizeZero
errors.msg: Minimum operation size must be greater than zero

errors.name: NestedFlashBlocked
errors.msg: A flash_swap_pt is already in progress on this market

errors.name: FlashRepayInsufficient
errors.msg: Flash callback did not deposit enough SY into escrow

errors.name: InsufficientPtLiquidity
errors.msg: Market lacks sufficient PT liquidity for the requested flash

types.name: AdminAction
docs: Curator-gated actions on a live vault. Every variant here is either a
*pause* (status flags), a *ratchet-down* (interest fee), or a *bookkeeping*
update (treasury target, claim limits). No variant can raise a fee, change
the curve, relax safety limits, or bump `max_py_supply` — those are
immutable post-init (PLAN §6.2 / I-E2).

types.name: CpiAccounts
docs: Account lists for validating CPI calls to the SY program

fields.name: get_sy_state
docs: Fetch SY state

fields.name: deposit_sy
docs: Deposit SY into personal account owned by vault

fields.name: withdraw_sy
docs: Withdraw SY from personal account owned by vault

fields.name: claim_emission
docs: Settle rewards for vault to accounts owned by the vault

fields.name: get_position_state
docs: Get personal yield position

fields.name: alt_index
docs: Address-lookup-table index

fields.name: token_account
docs: The token account for the emission where the vault authority is the authority

fields.name: final_index
docs: The final index is used to track the last claimable index after the vault expires

fields.name: treasury_token_account
docs: The treasury token account for this reward

fields.name: fee_bps
docs: The fee taken from emission collecting

fields.name: treasury_emission
docs: The lambo fund

types.name: EmissionSeed
docs: Init-time seed record for a `Vault.emissions` entry. Callers supply
the current SY emission index off-chain (read via a get_sy_state
before init) so we start accruing from the right point — seeding
`initial_index = ZERO` would retroactively credit pre-vault
emissions to the first YT holder.

fields.name: max_net_balance_change_negative_percentage
docs: Maximum allowed negative change in basis points (10000 = 100%)

fields.name: max_net_balance_change_positive_percentage
docs: Maximum allowed positive change in basis points (10000 = 100%)
Using u32 to allow for very large increases (up to ~429,496%)

types.name: MarketAdminAction
docs: Curator-gated actions on a live market. Same rules as AdminAction: only
pauses, ratchet-downs, and bookkeeping. The core curve parameters
(`ln_fee_rate_root`, `rate_scalar_root`) and `max_lp_supply` are frozen at
init and cannot be changed — a curator who wants a different curve must
spin up a new market.

types.name: MarketFinancials
docs: Financial parameters for the market

fields.name: expiration_ts
docs: Expiration timestamp, which is copied from the vault associated with the PT

fields.name: pt_balance
docs: Balance of PT in the market
This amount is tracked separately to prevent bugs from token transfers directly to the market

fields.name: sy_balance
docs: Balance of SY in the market
This amount is tracked separately to prevent bugs from token transfers directly to the market

fields.name: ln_fee_rate_root
docs: Initial log of fee rate, which decreases over time

fields.name: last_ln_implied_rate
docs: Last seen log of implied rate (APY) for PT
Used to maintain continuity of the APY between trades over time

fields.name: rate_scalar_root
docs: Initial rate scalar, which increases over time

fields.name: curator
docs: Curator authorized to modify this market's mutable settings.
Set at init; replaces the global admin-principle whitelist.

fields.name: creator_fee_bps
docs: Ceiling committed at init for this market's treasury SY fee.
Bounded by PROTOCOL_FEE_MAX_BPS at creation, immutable after.

fields.name: reentrancy_guard
docs: Non-reentrancy latch. Same semantics as Vault.reentrancy_guard.

fields.name: address_lookup_table
docs: Address to ALT

fields.name: mint_pt
docs: Mint of the vault's PT token

fields.name: mint_sy
docs: Mint of the SY program's SY token

fields.name: vault
docs: Link to yield-stripping vault

fields.name: mint_lp
docs: Mint for the market's LP tokens

fields.name: token_pt_escrow
docs: Token account that holds PT liquidity

fields.name: token_sy_escrow
docs: Pass-through token account for SY moving from the depositor to the SY program

fields.name: token_fee_treasury_sy
docs: Token account that holds SY fees from trade_pt

fields.name: fee_treasury_sy_bps
docs: Fee treasury SY BPS

fields.name: self_address
docs: Authority for CPI calls owned by the market struct

fields.name: signer_bump
docs: Bump for signing the PDA

fields.name: sy_program
docs: Link to the SY program ID

fields.name: cpi_accounts
docs: Record of CPI accounts

fields.name: seed_id
docs: Unique seed id for the market

fields.name: flash_pt_debt
docs: Pending PT owed back to this market by an in-flight `flash_swap_pt`.
Zero at rest. Non-zero means: (a) a flash callback is currently
executing and (b) no other `flash_swap_pt` may enter (blocks nested
flash reentry). See INTENT_FLASH_PLAN.md §5.3 and I-F1 in
INVARIANTS.md.
Appended at the end of the struct so existing markets' layouts are
not disturbed — the realloc_market ix grows them to include this
field on-demand. Markets without the appended bytes must not call
`flash_swap_pt` (guarded at handler entry).

types.name: Number
docs: High precision number, stored as 4 u64 words in little endian

fields.name: curator
docs: Curator authorized to modify this vault's mutable settings.
Set at init; replaces the global admin-principle whitelist.

fields.name: creator_fee_bps
docs: Ceiling committed at init for this vault's interest fee.
Bounded by PROTOCOL_FEE_MAX_BPS at creation, immutable after.
See I-E1 / I-E2 in PLAN.md §3.

fields.name: reentrancy_guard
docs: Non-reentrancy latch. Set to true before any untrusted SY CPI and
cleared on the way out. User-facing entrypoints must assert it is
false on entry. See I-C1 in PLAN.md §3.

fields.name: sy_program
docs: Link to SY program

fields.name: mint_sy
docs: Mint for SY token

fields.name: mint_yt
docs: Mint for the vault-specific YT token

fields.name: mint_pt
docs: Mint for the vault-specific PT token

fields.name: escrow_yt
docs: Escrow account for holding deposited YT

fields.name: escrow_sy
docs: Escrow account that holds temporary SY tokens
As an interchange between users and the SY program

fields.name: yield_position
docs: Link to a vault-owned YT position
This account collects yield from all "unstaked" YT

fields.name: address_lookup_table
docs: Address lookup table key for vault

fields.name: start_ts
docs: start timestamp

fields.name: duration
docs: seconds duration

fields.name: signer_seed
docs: Seed for CPI signing

fields.name: authority
docs: Authority for CPI signing

fields.name: signer_bump
docs: bump for signer authority PDA

fields.name: last_seen_sy_exchange_rate
docs: Last seen SY exchange rate
This continues to be updated even after vault maturity to track SY appreciation for treasury collection

fields.name: all_time_high_sy_exchange_rate
docs: This is the all time high exchange rate for SY

fields.name: final_sy_exchange_rate
docs: This is the exchange rate for SY when the vault expires

fields.name: total_sy_in_escrow
docs: How much SY is held in escrow

fields.name: sy_for_pt
docs: The total SY set aside to back the PT holders
This value is updated on every operation that touches the PT supply or the last seen exchange rate

fields.name: pt_supply
docs: Total supply of PT

fields.name: treasury_sy
docs: Amount of SY staged for the treasury

fields.name: uncollected_sy
docs: SY that has been earned by YT, but not yet collected

fields.name: owner
docs: Link to address that owns this position

fields.name: vault
docs: Link to vault that manages the YT

fields.name: yt_balance
docs: Track the YT balance of the user here

fields.name: interest
docs: Tracker for interest earned (paid in SY)

fields.name: emissions
docs: Tracker for emissions earned (paid in emission tokens)

types.name: YieldTokenTracker
docs: Generic tracker for interest and emissions earned by YT deposits

fields.name: last_seen_index
docs: The index is the per-share value of the SY token
Note that the YT balance must be converted to the equivalent SY balance

fields.name: staged
docs: Staged tokens that may be withdrawn
